message:
🌱 Add opentelemetry-operator: Operator enters CrashLoopBackOff  after multiple errors mission (#1616)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-operator-3471-operator-enters-crashloopbackoff-after-multiple-erro",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-operator: Operator enters CrashLoopBackOff  after multiple errors",
+    "description": "Operator enters CrashLoopBackOff  after multiple errors. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify opentelemetry-operator troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your opentelemetry-operator deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator -n opentelemetry-operator --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-operator configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-operator configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-operator -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-operator\n```\nWe're running the latest version of the operator — `v0.113.0` via `v0.74.2` of the operator Helm chart — but have a number of issues that are causing the operator to crashloop."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Operator enters CrashLoopBackOff  after multiple errors",
+        "description": "`ghcr.io/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/opentelemetry-operator:main:145216a3debc585a182e16915dd128364737a3e758f14de0826080394afe795d` has the fix. But we ran into another issue that operator wasn't able to list  Deployment: `no deployments found with the specified label`.\n\nFix for that is to\n```yaml\nmanager:\n  collectorImage:\n    repository: \"otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib\"\n\n  serviceMonitor:\n    enabled: true\n\n  prometheusRule:\n    enabled: true\n    defaultRules:\n      enabled: true\n\nadmissionWebhooks:\n  certManager:\n    issuerRef:\n      group: cert-manager.io\n      kind: ClusterIssuer\n      name: internal-legacy-issuer\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Operator enters CrashLoopBackOff  after multiple… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-operator -n opentelemetry-operator --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-operator --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "`ghcr.io/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/opentelemetry-operator:main:145216a3debc585a182e16915dd128364737a3e758f14de0826080394afe795d` has the fix. But we ran into another issue that operator wasn't able to list  Deployment: `no deployments found with the specified label`.\n\nFix for that is to make sure below labels exist on operator Deployment, as it's fixed",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "manager:\n  collectorImage:\n    repository: \"otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib\"\n\n  serviceMonitor:\n    enabled: true\n\n  prometheusRule:\n    enabled: true\n    defaultRules:\n      enabled: true\n\nadmissionWebhooks:\n  certManager:\n    issuerRef:\n      group: cert-manager.io\n      kind: ClusterIssuer\n      name: internal-legacy-issuer",
+        "{\n    \"level\": \"INFO\",\n    \"timestamp\": \"2024-11-19T08:41:23Z\",\n    \"message\": \"Starting the OpenTelemetry Operator\",\n    \"opentelemetry-operator\": \"0.113.0\",\n    \"opentelemetry-targetallocator\": \"ghcr.io/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/target-allocator:0.113.0\",\n    \"operator-opamp-bridge\": \"ghcr.io/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/operator-opamp-bridge:0.113.0\",\n    \"auto-instrumentation-java\": \"ghcr.io/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/autoinstrumentation-java:1.33.5\",\n    \"auto-instrumentation-nodejs\": \"ghcr.io/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/autoinstrumentation-nodejs:0.53.0\",\n    \"auto-instrumentation-python\": \"ghcr.io/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/autoinstrumentation-python:0.48b0\",\n    \"auto-instrumentation-dotnet\": \"ghcr.io/open-telemetry/opentelemetry",
+        "app.kubernetes.io/name: \"opentelemetry-operator\"\ncontrol-plane:  \"controller-manager\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry-operator"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Ingress"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator/issues/3471",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-operator"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 18,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-operator installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:25:18.299Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
